creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Fri May 23 08:09:36 2014
New Revision: 354918
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354918
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354918/

Log:
  - Update to 0.10.3
  - Add LICENSE (MIT)
  - Update MASTER_SITES
  - Pet portlint(1)
  
  PR:		ports/189475
  Submitted by:	olivierd@
  Approved by:	Stanislav Svirid <count@211.ru> (maintainer timeout)

Modified:
  head/net/py-netifaces/Makefile
  head/net/py-netifaces/distinfo
  head/net/py-netifaces/pkg-descr

Modified: head/net/py-netifaces/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/py-netifaces/Makefile	Fri May 23 07:59:13 2014	(r354917)
+++ head/net/py-netifaces/Makefile	Fri May 23 08:09:36 2014	(r354918)
@@ -2,15 +2,16 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	netifaces
-PORTVERSION=	0.8
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.10.3
 CATEGORIES=	net python
-MASTER_SITES=	http://alastairs-place.net/projects/netifaces/
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	count@211.ru
 COMMENT=	Getting network addresses from Python
 
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes

Modified: head/net/py-netifaces/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net/py-netifaces/distinfo	Fri May 23 07:59:13 2014	(r354917)
+++ head/net/py-netifaces/distinfo	Fri May 23 08:09:36 2014	(r354918)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (netifaces-0.8.tar.gz) = 53a711038db3d6e5cf7129d6f751185fd052f830f12f271fbfe17bd2671ab1ec
-SIZE (netifaces-0.8.tar.gz) = 15484
+SHA256 (netifaces-0.10.3.tar.gz) = aea93f6c7d0840eb3bd5c38f1950b3d130148b9894453d67b3445adc9779332d
+SIZE (netifaces-0.10.3.tar.gz) = 22963

Modified: head/net/py-netifaces/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/net/py-netifaces/pkg-descr	Fri May 23 07:59:13 2014	(r354917)
+++ head/net/py-netifaces/pkg-descr	Fri May 23 08:09:36 2014	(r354918)
@@ -4,4 +4,4 @@ It's been irritating me for ages that it
 straightforwardly get the network address(es) of the machine
 you're running on from a Python program.
 
-WWW:	http://alastairs-place.net/netifaces/
+WWW: http://alastairs-place.net/netifac
